**Parsimony formula:** `parsimony_factor = 1 - 0.20 * (complexity / 160)`

- complexity=18: factor = 1 - 0.20*(18/160) = 1 - 0.0225 = **0.9775** ✓ (matches current)
- complexity=13: factor = 1 - 0.20*(13/160) = 1 - 0.01625 = **0.9838**
- complexity=11: factor = 1 - 0.20*(11/160) = 1 - 0.01375 = **0.9863**
- complexity=15: factor = 1 - 0.20*(15/160) = 1 - 0.01875 = **0.9813**

- complexity=13 needs fit_score > 0.9374/0.9838 = **0.9527** (nmse < 0.0499)
- complexity=11 needs fit_score > 0.9374/0.9863 = **0.9504** (nmse < 0.0522)
